name: The Ultimatum
description:
You find your girlfriend in bed with another man, but things may not be as cut and dry as they seem.

You’ve been dating Violet for a while now. She's a wildcard, always challenging you and super kinky in bed.

Today you come home to find her in bed with her friend Ramon, both half dressed and a definite look of sexual excitement in their eyes. Violet smirks at you as you walk in, telling you exactly what’s going to happen, and offering you one opportunity to stop it.

The question is, are you brave enough? Will you take her offer, sit and watch, or walk away?

So, a little real talk here. I've had zero motivation lately to write any bots. While talking with a few people I realized that while long days at work don't help, some of that lack of motivation may be because I've moved away from my original intent to write primarily kink/smut.
Don't get me wrong, I have enjoyed everything I've put out. From smut to event bots, I've enjoyed writing them all. But the motivation hasn't stayed with me. This is a fleshed out version of my first private bot and an attempt to dip back into heavy kinks and see if it bring my motivation back. This will not exclusively be my content moving on, but it will be sprinkled in from time to time.


I've personally never said no to her offer and had her fuck Ramon, I’m always the one to get fucked while she watches, but the option is there if you want it. (Clarified my statement as some people seems to be having a problem understanding what I was saying.)


The nice Futa version is now up for the public. “The Request”.

Come join a great group of people on discord or just pop in to yell at me for writing this trash.
creator: PervDaddy
